# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/elpatron/KlunaAI/Bridge/OpenSMILE/vendor/opensmile/build_ios_arm64
# It was generated by CMake: /opt/homebrew/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

APPLE:BOOL=TRUE

//Path to a library.
AUDIOTOOLBOX:FILEPATH=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks/AudioToolbox.framework

//Path to a library.
AVFOUNDATION:FILEPATH=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks/AVFoundation.framework

//Build flags controlling which components of openSMILE are included
// in the build.
BUILD_FLAGS:STRING=

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_LIBSVM:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_RNN:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
BUILD_SVMSMO:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-NOTFOUND

CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING='-miphoneos-version-min=9.0 -fembed-bitcode -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fobjc-abi-version=2 -fobjc-arc '

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING='-miphoneos-version-min=9.0 -fembed-bitcode -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fobjc-abi-version=2 -fobjc-arc  -O0 -g '

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING='-miphoneos-version-min=9.0 -fembed-bitcode -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fobjc-abi-version=2 -fobjc-arc  -DNDEBUG -Os -ffast-math '

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING='-miphoneos-version-min=9.0 -fembed-bitcode -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fobjc-abi-version=2 -fobjc-arc  -DNDEBUG -O3 -ffast-math '

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING='-miphoneos-version-min=9.0 -fembed-bitcode -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fobjc-abi-version=2 -fobjc-arc  -DNDEBUG -O2 -g -ffast-math '

CMAKE_CXX_LINK_FLAGS:STRING='-miphoneos-version-min=9.0  -Wl,-search_paths_first '

CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING='-miphoneos-version-min=9.0 -fembed-bitcode -fobjc-abi-version=2 -fobjc-arc '

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

CMAKE_C_LINK_FLAGS:STRING='-miphoneos-version-min=9.0 -Wl,-search_paths_first '

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Path to a library.
COREFOUNDATION:FILEPATH=/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks/CoreFoundation.framework

//Minimum SDK version to build for.
DEPLOYMENT_TARGET:STRING=9.0

//Whether or not to enable ARC
ENABLE_ARC_INT:BOOL=TRUE

//Whether or not to enable bitcode
ENABLE_BITCODE_INT:BOOL=TRUE

//Whether or not to use strict compiler checks
ENABLE_STRICT_TRY_COMPILE_INT:BOOL=FALSE

//Whether or not to hide symbols (-fvisibility=hidden)
ENABLE_VISIBILITY_INT:BOOL=FALSE

//Git command line client
GIT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/opt/homebrew/bin/git

IOS:BOOL=TRUE

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
IS_IOS_PLATFORM:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//Tune compiler optimizations to the processor of this machine.
// Disable if the compiled binary needs to be portable.
MARCH_NATIVE:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
PLATFORM:UNINITIALIZED=OS64

//Type of platform for which the build targets.
PLATFORM_INT:STRING=OS64

//Path where to save profile information for profile-guided optimization.
PROFILE_GENERATE:PATH=

//Path to profile information to use for profile-guided optimization.
PROFILE_USE:PATH=

//Creating a static library
SMILEAPI_STATIC_LINK:BOOL=ON

//Dependencies for the target
SMILEapi_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;opensmile;

//Build libopensmile as a static lib.
STATIC_LINK:BOOL=ON

UNIX:BOOL=TRUE

//Expose CMAKE_GENERATOR
USED_CMAKE_GENERATOR:STRING=Unix Makefiles

//Compile with FFmpeg support.
WITH_FFMPEG:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with Julius support.
WITH_JULIUS:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with OpenCV support.
WITH_OPENCV:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with OpenSL ES support (Android only).
WITH_OPENSLES:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with PortAudio support.
WITH_PORTAUDIO:BOOL=OFF

openSMILE_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON
